critical_fixes.details: Missing 'status', 'location', 'affiliation', and 'race' in frontmatter. Template requires these for type: npc.

content_gaps.details: Frontmatter status is 'Alive', but latest chronicle Entry 39 shows they have lost their divine connection and are despondent. Snapshots show a 'Weakened / Trapped' status for their parent deity Auriel.
content_gaps.suggested_fix: Update status to 'Alive (Disconnected)' or add condition: Connection to Auriel Severed.

content_gaps.details: Mentioned in Entry 38 (Entrusting the Grey Pearl to Corbin) and Entry 39 (Favor owed by Voss), but these specific exploits are not in the Campaign History section.
content_gaps.suggested_fix: Add entries for Entry 38 and 39 regarding the Grey Pearl fail-safe and alliance with Captain Voss.

content_gaps.details: Mentioned in Entry 39 (Boarding the Tidecaller and Moon Grace ritual) but missing from Campaign History.
content_gaps.suggested_fix: Append Entry 39: Presented Grey Pearl to Captain Voss and boarded the Tidecaller for Adalens.

renames.reason: Quartz Optimization: File name should be Title Case to match system manifest conventions.
Alignment with established naming pattern for location-based generic NPCs (e.g., Barkeep (Durvish City)).
